name: marinara-rpg-rp-mode-extension
description: Custom RPG rulesets for Marinara Engine's Roleplay Mode. System-agnostic framework with two complete reference rulesets (D&D 5e, Exalted 3e), AI-feedable build documentation, and a six-agent architecture (main narrator + state-mutator, state-reminder, combat-adjudicator, lore-query, npc-bookkeeper). Runs alongside Marinara's default world-state, prose-guardian, continuity, and expression agents.
